memoryArtifacts.headline: García Ramírez of Navarre (Wikipedia)
memoryArtifacts.description:
García Ramírez of Navarre
King of Pamplona
García Ramírez (Basque: Gartzea Remiritz), sometimes García IV, V, VI or VII (c. 1112 - 21 November, 1150), called the Restorer (Spanish: el Restaurador, Bas …

zh.lifeSummary: 當García Ramírez King of Navarre於1099年9月9日出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納時，他的父親Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón29歲，母親Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar22歲。他於1131年與Margarete de L'Aigle在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1150年11月21日在西班牙納法洛亞代利洛爾卡享年51歲，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当García Ramírez King of Navarre于1099年9月9日出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納时，他的父亲Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón29岁，母亲Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar22岁。他于1131年与Margarete de L'Aigle在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1150年11月21日在西班牙納法洛亞代利洛爾卡享年51岁，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

nameMeanings.name: Ramírez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Jorge, Raul, Roberto, Pedro, Ramon.
Spanish (Ramírez): patronymic from the personal name Ramiro . Compare De Ramirez .

variants.name: Rameriez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Ramírez (see Ramirez ).

variants.name: Rameriz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Alejandro, Felipe, Fermin, Lupe, Manuel, Margarita, Margarito, Miguel, Pedro.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Ramírez (see Ramirez ).

variants.name: Ramiro
meanings: Portuguese, Galician, and Spanish: from the personal name Ramiro, of Visigothic origin, presumably composed of the ancient Germanic elements rād ‘counsel’ + māri, mēri ‘fame, famous’.

nameMeanings.name: García
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

variants.name: Marsha
meanings: Phonetic spelling of   Marcia  , associated particularly with the American film star  Marsha Hunt  (  b. 1917 ).

en.lifeSummary: When García Ramírez King of Navarre was born on 9 September 1099, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain, his father, Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón, was 29 and his mother, Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar, was 22. He married Margarete de L'Aigle in 1131, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 November 1150, in Lorca, Deierri, Nafarroa, Spain, at the age of 51, and was buried in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque García Ramírez King of Navarre est né le 9 septembre 1099, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne, son père, Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margarete de L'Aigle en 1131, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 novembre 1150, à Lorca, Deierri, Nafarroa, Espagne, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne.

de.St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Re: St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als García Ramírez King of Navarre am 9. September 1099 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón 29 und seine Mutter Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar 22. Er hat 1131 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien Margarete de L'Aigle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. November 1150 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Lorca, Deierri, Nafarroa, Spanien und wurde in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando García Ramírez King of Navarre è nato il il 9 settembre 1099 nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna, il suo padre, Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margarete de L'Aigle nel 1131, nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 novembre 1150, nel Lorca, Deierri, Nafarroa, Spagna, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: García Ramírez King of Navarreが1099年9月9日にスペインナファロアイルnアで生まれた時，父Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzónは29歳，母Cristina Rodríguez de Vivarは22歳であった。1131年にスペインナファロアイルnアでMargarete de L'Aigleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1150年11月21日にスペインナファロアデイエリロルカで51歳で死去し，スペインナファロアイルnアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: García Ramírez King of Navarre(이)가 1099년 9월 9일 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1131년 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 Margarete de L'Aigle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1150년 11월 21일 스페인 나파로 데이리 로르카에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 나파로 이루n아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando García Ramírez King of Navarre nasceu em 9 de setembro de 1099, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha, seu pai, Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margarete de L'Aigle em 1131, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1150, em Lorca, Deierri, Nafarroa, Espanha, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда García Ramírez King of Navarre родился 9 сентября 1099 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания, его отцу по имени Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margarete de L'Aigle в 1131 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 ноября 1150 г. в местности лорка, диирри, нафарроа, Испания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando García Ramírez King of Navarre nació el 9 de septiembre de 1099, en Pamplona, Navarra, España, su papá, Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margarete de L'Aigle en 1131, en Pamplona, Navarra, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de noviembre de 1150, en Lorca, Valle de Yerri, Navarra, España, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Pamplona, Navarra, España.
